_comment: Copy relevant values in. The extension loads answers from chrome.storage if present, otherwise this file. 'description' helps the LLM match fields; 'sensitive: true' forces manual review and never auto-fills.

first_name.description: First / given name (when the form splits name)

last_name.description: Last / family / surname (when the form splits name)

current_job_title.description: Current or most recent job title

current_company.description: Current or most recent company name

current_start_date.description: Start date of current/most recent role

current_end_date.description: End date of current/most recent role (leave blank if current)

currently_work_here.description: Do you currently work here? yes/no

current_description.description: Description / key achievements in current/most recent role

past1_job_title.description: Previous job title (most recent prior role)

past1_company.description: Previous company name (most recent prior role)

past1_dates.description: Employment dates for previous role (most recent prior)

past1_description.description: Description / achievements for previous role (most recent prior)

past2_job_title.description: Job title for the role before that

past2_company.description: Company name for the role before that

past2_dates.description: Employment dates for the role before that

past2_description.description: Description / achievements for the role before that

years_experience.description: How many years of professional experience do you have?

years_key_skill.description: How many years of experience with your primary programming language / skill?

team_leadership.description: Do you have experience managing a team or leading projects? yes/no

environment_experience.description: Have you worked in a remote / agile / enterprise environment before? yes/no

highest_degree.description: Highest degree achieved: High School, Bachelor's, Master's, PhD

graduation_date.description: Graduation date or expected graduation date

certifications.description: Relevant certifications, e.g. AWS, PMP, Scrum

libraries_tools.description: Libraries, frameworks, and tools you use

authorized_to_work.description: Are you legally authorized to work in the country? yes/no

needs_sponsorship.description: Will you now or in the future require visa sponsorship? yes/no

start_date.description: Notice period / earliest available start date

work_arrangement.description: Preferred work location model: Remote, Hybrid, or On-site

prior_employee.description: Have you ever been employed by this company or its subsidiaries in the past? yes/no

over_18.description: Are you 18 years of age or older? yes/no

gender_identity.description: Gender identity: Male, Female, Non-binary, Not Disclosed

race_ethnicity.description: Race/Ethnicity: White, Black/African American, Hispanic/Latino, Asian, American Indian/Alaska Native, Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander, Two or More Races, Not Disclosed

veteran_status.description: Veteran status: Protected Veteran, Not a Veteran, Not Disclosed

disability_status.description: Disability status: Yes I have a disability (or history of one), No, Not Disclosed

how_heard.description: How did you hear about this position?

referral_name.description: If referred by a current employee, their name
